Fabiana, the roadmap looks solid. We are going to hit the January milestone on time.
Agreed. But the deployment is due to start in March, and the migration is running behind. We need to accelerate.
What do you suggest? The pilot program is about to be finalized. Can we bring forward the testing?
Yes. If we bring forward testing by two weeks, by mid-March we will have completed everything. The forecast also shows higher demand, so scalability is key.
Good thinking. I will update the budget allocation and share the revised projections by Friday. We are on track.
Perfect. We are meeting the VP tomorrow to present this. By Q2, we are going to have a fully integrated supply chain across all APAC markets.

Good morning everyone. I would like to walk you through the strategic plan for Q1 next year. Based on our current projections, we are going to expand the APAC vendor network from three to five partners by March. The demand forecast indicates a twelve percent increase in terminal orders. By the end of Q1, we will have completed the migration to the new tracking platform. We are about to finalize the budget allocation for the regional hubs. The roadmap shows three key milestones: first, vendor onboarding will be completed by January fifteenth. Second, the pilot program is due to launch in February. Third, full deployment is scheduled for mid-March. Looking at the timeline, we are on track, but there are risks. If demand grows faster than projected, we may need to accelerate the procurement cycle. I am confident that by Q2, the new system will be fully operational.

Hi team, here is a quick review of where we stand on the strategic plan. The projections from last quarter were largely accurate. We are going to hit the January milestone on time. The vendor onboarding is about to be completed, and the pilot program is on schedule. However, the demand forecast has been revised upward by eight percent, which means we will need to adjust the procurement timeline. By the end of this month, I will have finalized the revised budget with finance. The roadmap has been updated to reflect the new milestones. One concern: the deployment is due to start in March, but the migration is running two weeks behind schedule. If we do not accelerate, we are not going to meet the mid-March deadline. I recommend we bring forward the testing phase to close the gap. Looking ahead, our strategic priority is scalability. By Q2, we are going to have a fully integrated supply chain across all APAC markets.

Marcus presents the strategic plan for Q1 next year. The team reviews demand projections and vendor expansion targets. Fabiana updates the roadmap with revised milestones. They identify a risk with the deployment timeline. The team agrees to accelerate the testing phase to meet the March deadline.
